git commit -m "docs(bf-45h5): complete GRIB2 file verification with eccodes

- Confirmed GDT 3.30 (Lambert Conformal) on all messages
- Verified DRT=3 (complex packing) on 81.8% (HRRR) and 100% (NAM) of messages
- Used Python eccodes library (wgrib2 compilation failed on Debian Trixie)
- Generated detailed verification output for both files
- HRRR: 170 messages, 100% GDT 3.30, 81.8% DRT=3
- NAM: 794 messages, 100% GDT 3.30, 100% DRT=3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>"
